descriptionText: Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013| Guest Cabins:3| crew Cabin:3 PRICE: 890,000 US$The Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 is a well‑known model from Sunseeker’s respected Manhattan range, offering a balance of comfort, performance, and thoughtful layout design. This particular 2013 example, located in Hong Kong, is in good condition and presents an appealing option for buyers looking for a yacht that delivers both usability and style without being overstated. Her layout, engineering, and onboard spaces reflect Sunseeker’s consistent approach to practical cruising, making her suitable for family use, entertaining, or longer coastal journeys.Specifications:• Brand: Sunseeker • Model: Manhattan 63 • Year: 2013 • Length: 21.28 m • Max. Beam: 6.9 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.5 m • Location: Hong Kong • Max. Speed: 30 knots • Fuel Tank: 3,500 l • Water Tank: 950 l • Engines: 2 x MAN 1000HP • Guest Cabins: 3 • Crew Cabins: 3At 21.28 metres in length with a 6.9‑metre beam, the Manhattan 63 provides generous interior volume while remaining easy to handle for her size. The hull is constructed in FRP, keeping weight reasonable and contributing to stable performance. Powered by twin MAN 1000HP engines, she can reach a maximum speed of around 30 knots, allowing for flexible cruising speeds depending on conditions and preference. The fuel capacity of 3,500 litres supports extended trips, while a 950‑litre water tank provides ample supply for guests and crew.One of the notable features of this Sunseeker Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 is her adaptable interior arrangement. The lower deck includes a dedicated galley, positioned well for both convenience and efficient use of space. Adjacent to this is a spacious lounge currently set up for karaoke, offering a relaxed area for gatherings. If desired, this space can be returned to its original purpose as the master cabin, giving future owners options depending on how they prefer to configure the yacht. In addition to this area, two further guest cabins provide comfortable accommodation, complemented by three crew cabins that support professional onboard service.The main deck benefits from an expanded salon and entertainment area, giving a light and open feel. Large panoramic windows around the superstructure draw in natural light and connect the interior with the surrounding sea views. This sense of openness is one of the appealing characteristics of the Manhattan 63 range, as it creates a pleasant atmosphere during both daytime cruising and evenings at anchor.For buyers looking for a yacht in this size category, this Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 offers a balanced package: reliable performance, a versatile layout, and a condition that has been maintained to a good standard. She suits owners who appreciate practical design and who want a yacht that provides comfort without unnecessary complication.Overall, this Sunseeker Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 presents a sensible and attractive opportunity for those seeking a yacht with a straightforward layout, dependable performance, and a condition that reflects careful ownership.
descriptionHtml:
Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013| Guest Cabins:3| crew Cabin:3
PRICE: 890,000 US$

The Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 is a well‑known model from Sunseeker’s respected Manhattan range, offering a balance of comfort, performance, and thoughtful layout design. This particular 2013 example, located in Hong Kong, is in good condition and presents an appealing option for buyers looking for a yacht that delivers both usability and style without being overstated. Her layout, engineering, and onboard spaces reflect Sunseeker’s consistent approach to practical cruising, making her suitable for family use, entertaining, or longer coastal journeys.

Specifications:

• Brand: Sunseeker
• Model: Manhattan 63
• Year: 2013
• Length: 21.28 m
• Max. Beam: 6.9 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.5 m
• Location: Hong Kong
• Max. Speed: 30 knots
• Fuel Tank: 3,500 l
• Water Tank: 950 l
• Engines: 2 x MAN 1000HP
• Guest Cabins: 3
• Crew Cabins: 3

At 21.28 metres in length with a 6.9‑metre beam, the Manhattan 63 provides generous interior volume while remaining easy to handle for her size. The hull is constructed in FRP, keeping weight reasonable and contributing to stable performance. Powered by twin MAN 1000HP engines, she can reach a maximum speed of around 30 knots, allowing for flexible cruising speeds depending on conditions and preference. The fuel capacity of 3,500 litres supports extended trips, while a 950‑litre water tank provides ample supply for guests and crew.

One of the notable features of this Sunseeker Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 is her adaptable interior arrangement. The lower deck includes a dedicated galley, positioned well for both convenience and efficient use of space. Adjacent to this is a spacious lounge currently set up for karaoke, offering a relaxed area for gatherings. If desired, this space can be returned to its original purpose as the master cabin, giving future owners options depending on how they prefer to configure the yacht. In addition to this area, two further guest cabins provide comfortable accommodation, complemented by three crew cabins that support professional onboard service.

The main deck benefits from an expanded salon and entertainment area, giving a light and open feel. Large panoramic windows around the superstructure draw in natural light and connect the interior with the surrounding sea views. This sense of openness is one of the appealing characteristics of the Manhattan 63 range, as it creates a pleasant atmosphere during both daytime cruising and evenings at anchor.

For buyers looking for a yacht in this size category, this Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 offers a balanced package: reliable performance, a versatile layout, and a condition that has been maintained to a good standard. She suits owners who appreciate practical design and who want a yacht that provides comfort without unnecessary complication.

Overall, this Sunseeker Manhattan 63 For Sale 2013 presents a sensible and attractive opportunity for those seeking a yacht with a straightforward layout, dependable performance, and a condition that reflects careful ownership.
